reviews.title: Glitches
reviews.text: I got this mouse because I left my good mouse at a friend's house, who I won't see for a month. I guess you get what you pay for because I've been working for about 2 hours and I've had to take the battery out to reset 5 times. The mouse icon just stops moving. At first I thought it happened when I was typing and went to move it again and it went to sleep, because the light went off. But it just stops mid move on a screen. It's almost better to just use the laptop track pad. I would not recommend

reviews.title: Wonderful mouse for the price!
reviews.text: I love this mouse! It fits perfectly in my hand, and the usb Bluetooth works great with no issues. The clicks are silent, but the scroller click is not silent. This is fine for me since I don’t use my scroller to click very often, but if that bothers you, I thought it was important to point out.

reviews.title: Lightweight and Responsive
reviews.text: This little mouse is nice and responsive. I really enjoy using it. It's comfortable, too. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Not what I expected.
reviews.text:
It’s super super lightweight and feels very cheap. It comes with no instructions what so ever. It comes with a little usb input and so I plug it into my Chromebook and put in one AA battery. I flip the switch to on and it starts glowing red. I don’t know what the red light means, again, no instructions. Are the batteries dead? Is it not connected? No idea.
I open up the Bluetooth menu and it’s scanning and nothing is coming up and then I realize the cursor is moving with the mouse. I start rolling it around and it has horrible traction. It’s not a smooth motion as you’d expect from a mouse. Again, maybe my batteries were low, maybe the connection was low, I can’t say, although I switched out the batteries about 3 times and I doubt all 3 batteries were close to dead. I bought this for my sons online homework that he has to do, it consist of a lot of dragging items to designated locations on the screen and he’s been having difficulty using the mouse pad on the Chromebook . But it’s so flimsy, my daughter picked it up and lost it amongst the mess of toys and I don’t even feel at a loss.

reviews.title: Sleek and Elegant
reviews.text: This Mouse is a perfect match for our white Cherry keyboard. It has all the basic functions you need without the fancy programable buttons that some gaming people use. We find it exacting in use when we do retouching in Photoshop and movements are precise, with the nano receiver, and fast all the time. This is a good basic mouse to use every day on any computer. It's attractive and fits your hand comfortably.

reviews.title: Worked straight out the box
reviews.text: Small and comfortable. Easy to set up and use. Great value.

reviews.title: A very nice mouse.
reviews.text:
I tried to use both of the most recent Apple mouse products with my Macbook Pro and never could get the hang of either one of them. I tried configuring them in the applications folder but never could get it right plus neither one of them was comfortable. One had a ball and the other newer one did not. Usually I really like apple products but not this time. I am happy to report this Logitech worked right out of the box after I plugged in the USB thingy. i didn't even have to set it up. I do like the roller ball. I think this mouse can do more than I know about, but am just happy it isn't changing the page I am on constantly. I got the one that was painted blue and green because it was about 6.00 cheaper than the solid colored ones. I like the design now that I have it. Since my laptop only has two USB plug ins, I bought the Amazon USB hub with three additional spots. Am happy with that too.
UPDATE 11-08-14
All of a sudden I am getting these messages saying the battery is critically low. To start with I was changing the batteries every time but it was happening way too fast so I bought a battery checker. Turns out my batteries are fine. Testing 100 %. the mouse continue to operate even though I continue receiving low battery warnings. Don't know how this is going to play out but it is the first sign of trouble. Now I just take battery out. Test it and when it continues to say 100 % I put it back in and the message goes away for a couple of days. Aggravating. I am amending star count down to 4 stars. Can't change stars.

reviews.title: Works great - great little wireless mouse.
reviews.text: I got this for my daughters birthday - she loved the design.  It synced right up and worked immediately.  It worked great with her computer - she really liked he feel of the mouse.  It is easy to pack away and travel with as well.

reviews.title: The middle click and scroll wheel work great! Microsoft 4000 is smoother and more comfortable though.
reviews.text:
I own this mouse as well as the Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 now. I find them to be head to head competitors, so here's a quick comparison.

Logitech:
-Somewhat of a loud click, doesn't bother me personally, but it is obviously louder
-The harder you flick the scroll wheel the more it'll spin. There is resistance though and I feel like it's easier to use than the Microsoft mouse.
-It looks cool and functionality is fine. The middle click is easy to use and the left/right of the wheel to move back or forward in a web browser works and isn't annoyingly used by accident.

Microsoft:
-Quiet click and smoother sliding on the desk
-The wheel stops once your finger leaves it. You can't just flick and go. Scrolling seems more precise with this one, but I actually prefer the Logitech as I feel like I have more functional control with it.
-There is a side button that moves you backward in a web browser, the wheel left and right tilting doesn't seem to do anything.
-More comfortable in my hand.

Bottom line: Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 is smoother and more comfortable, but Logitech is more functional, especially for the middle click and scroll wheel. I was very skeptical about the benefits of this "free-wheel" but I love it now. If you're not a big scroll wheel and middle click enthusiast go with the Microsoft, otherwise the Logitech is for you.

title: Logitech POP Mouse, Wireless Mouse with Customizable Emojis, SilentTouch Technology, Precision/Speed Scroll, Compact Design, Bluetooth, Multi-Device, OS Compatible - Mist
description: Logitech POP Mouse - Silent Wireless Mouse Let personality POP on your deskspace and beyond with POP Mouse, your whisper-quiet, wireless mouse with fresh customization features. Take your self-expression further and download Logitech Software to customize the top button. Give it your own twist by assigning it to send your favorite emoji or another shortcut - such as Snip Screen, Mic Mute or Voice-to-Text. POP Mouse fits comfortably in your hand and slips easily into your pocket, handbag or computer case. SilentTouch technology makes every click whisper-quiet. The portable mouse's SmartWheel stays in sync with you, easily shifting from high-precision to speed scroll mode. Pair POP Mouse with up to 3 different devices at once, and use the Easy-Switch button to toggle between them. Alternatively, activate FLOW and glide between screens as you work, transferring text, files and images with a simple copy and paste. Connect the cordless mouse to your desktop, tablet or phone* using Bluetooth or a Logi Bolt USB receiver which you can purchase separately. With a classic Logitech promise of durability, POP Mouse is your companion for the long haul, with up to 24-month battery life** and auto-sleep power-saving technology that helps it last. Product details: Number of buttons: 4 Top button customizable with Emoji Software Sensor technology: Logitech High Precision Optical Tracking Battery type: 1 x AA battery (included) Battery life: Up to 24 months** Connection type: Bluetooth 5.1 Compatible with Logi Bolt USB receiver Wireless range: 32.81 ft (10 m) Compatible with Windows 10 or later, macOS 10.15 or later, iPadOS, Chrome OS and Android *Windows, macOS, Chrome OS, Android, iPadOS **Battery life may vary based on use and computing conditions.

reviews.title: Horrible Connection
reviews.text: I’ve tried this mouse with multiple devices now and it disconnects and reconnects every five seconds. It’s basically impossible to use.

reviews.title: Quiet and super fast Bluetooth setup - no Emoji function with iPadOS
reviews.text: Within a minute of taking this out of the box, I had it paired with my iPad. It was seriously so easy to just pair and go, and I love how it can be paired with three different things (just push a little button on the bottom of the mouse to switch between computers/iPads). It feels okay in my hand - not the highest quality I’ve seen (plastic is very basic and it is pretty lightweight as well), but it doesn’t feel cheap. The color is so fun, which is the main reason I got it. Also it is very quiet and doesn’t have any loud clicking. The one thing to mention is that the circle button under the scrolling wheel doesn’t have any functionality with an iPad. Nothing was happening when I kept clicking it to try and use the emoji shortcut, so after heading over to Logitech’s website i saw “*Emojis and software are currently supported on Windows® and macOS only.” So maybe iPadOS will eventually support this capability, but as of now it is useless. Overall I still like the mouse a lot for it’s ease of use, quietness, and color.

reviews.title: Beautiful little mouse with a pink color that truly POPS!
reviews.text:
THE GOOD:
---------------
* The pink color of this mouse really POPS!
* Operation is smooth, just like any mouse.

* Battery is included and is rated for 2 yrs. Wow, we'll see.

THE BAD:
------------

I got this mouse because my little girl loves pink, and the red coral color here truly pops! She does basic homework stuff on the pc. She's not at that chatting age yet, so I don't really care or tested the emoji feature. Logitech didn't make it easy for you to test it out anyway, so I didn't bother. I'll go 4-Stars overall.

reviews.title: Nice, but too large for my hands
reviews.text: This was a nice mouse. Scrolled smoothly. However the scroll wheel was too far to comfortably use with my hands. I had to keep reaching for the wheel and it was causing stress on my elbows. I ended up retuning it. I will look for a smaller mouse that will fit my hands better. If you have large hands this mouse will work well for you.

reviews.title: Great product!
reviews.text: Super easy to install and perfect smooth glide.

reviews.title: Wish i had known about it sooner!
reviews.text: Took some getting used too, but i love it, it is much easier to use not so harsh on my wrist!

reviews.title: Great Ergo Mouse
reviews.text: It's a comfortable mouse...  my wrist doesn't hurt and it fits my abnormally small hands (I have to shop for gloves in the boys' section).  I like the button and wheel placement.  One thing that took a bit of getting used to but I've grown to like is the sleep function...  Sure it takes a click to wake it up, but it saves the batteries.

title: LED Bluetooth Mouse for Laptop iPad MacBook pro Wireless Mouse for Laptop MacBook Air Mac Chromebook
description: Packing list: Instructions x1, LED charging Bluetooth + 2.4G dual-mode wireless mouse x1, 2.4g Nano USB wireless receiver x1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line x1, USB C-type adapter x1, packing box x1, How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:  Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse. How to connect to iPad Pro/iPad Air/ Mini/ iPhone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse  first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.) (1) open ipad Settings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)  🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse? 🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
features: 🖱💻🖥📱BEST COMPATIBLE BLUETOOTH 5.1 CHIP: Compatible with more than 99.8% Bluetooth devices. This bluetooth mouse is suitable for all laptops with bluetooth function or ipad iPhone with iOS13 or above
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
✅BUILT-IN BATTERY: Built-in battery,easy to charge by micro usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.please please keep the mouse power switch in "ON" position when charging .

✅ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

✅AUTO ENERGY-SAVINGSLEEPING MODE: Li-polymer batteries,high cycle life.the Auto Switch Off function will help you save energy as your bluetooth mouse will switch off when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If you do not use the mouse for eight minutes, it will go to sleeping mode, you can press the any button to weak it up.

reviews.title: Bad product
reviews.text: It worked for a bit and then it just wouldn’t move ni matter if I charged it. Not happy

reviews.title: Lightweight and smooth.
reviews.text: Clicks easily and slides on mouse pad smoothly. A bit frustrating that it goes into sleep mode after a short time when I’m busy elsewhere but ease of use makes it okay. You need to be careful putting in the charger since the mouse is lightweight. And I love the pink color!

reviews.title: I like it
reviews.text: I like most of things to be wireless, and I really like this mouse because I have yet to have an issue with the bluetooth connection. I will say that you do have to push a bit harder to click the mouse than I am normally used to, but it's negligible and ultimately didn't bother me. I like the lights on it, and the side of the mouse works great for me (although it's a bit small for someone with big hands). I would buy again.

reviews.title: Goes to sleep when you need it the most
reviews.text: Won't stay connected to my laptop and goes to sleep.  Have to power cycle to get it to work again.  Even tried leaving the USB cable plugged in and it still goes to sleep.

reviews.title: Looks expensive but feels cheap
reviews.text:
The included USB charging line does not fit snug. Feels like an aftermarket adapter and felt as if the mouse would break is pushed all the way in or pulled out. Time will tell if the charging line lasts. I'll update as time goes on.

It has the feel of a toy but the girls in the house are already asking for one like it, so pretty sells. Color is towards the green scale but works well with seafoam colors.

reviews.title: awesome mouse, awesome vendor!
reviews.text: mouse was delivered a little earlier than expected, which is great! corsair is a highly trusted brand and the last one we had, same model, lasted a good 3 years before the stroller wheel gave out. there probably is a way to just clean the wheel, but we just got a new mouse and intend on keeping the old one. it has extremely smooth dpi and motion with a nicely weighted feel. good solid unit!

reviews.title: Good FPS mouse
reviews.text: The materials wear really easily but it was perfect for my build and is light enough for the games I play, love the dpi buttons

reviews.title: double click problem after only 6 months
reviews.text: Bought this 6 months ago, now 6 months later I'm having this "double left click" problem. I thought this issue is rare, turned out it's extremely popular with this new Corsair mouse. My last 2 Corsair mice lasted 12 years, this one is garbage. Do not buy this unless you plan on doing RMA with Corsair while waiting 30 days for them to replace your mouse like I am right now. Extremely frustrating. If you don't believe me, search for all other corsair mice, they all have low 4 star reviews with double left click problems.

title: KawaiiMouse [ Optical 2.4G Wireless Mouse ] Butterfly Bling Glitter Shiny Diamond

reviews.title: Amazing l! Always get what I order with fast shipping and selections to choose from!!
reviews.text: I’m always satisfied with anything I have ordered from Amazon and they nailed it with this order. Since I was drooping sizes I wasn’t sure!!  Super fast shipping!!! I had placed a big order, 3 days after placing order, I was opening my packages, and that’s counting the evening I placed my order!  I received  all my order at same time,I had to order several clothing items due to a major  weight loss because of illness!!!! Everything I have is too big for me now so I had nothing to wear and when I say nothing, I mean NOTHING!!! I had to order smaller sized clothes  so I’d have some clothes to wear!! I’m talking about losing 28lbs, which doctors say I’m  probably not gonna gain back, maybe  5-10lbs if I’m lucky!!!  All I been wearing is my pj’s and yes had to order some pj’s!!!!! I’m normally a small, sizes 5,6,7, weight 120-125, small frame,and am 5’3” tall. So I can’t afford to lose weight esp. 28lbs which was all lost over a 4 wk period of time, I have trouble keeping weight on me anyway!! And I can’t gorge myself with the foods that will make me gain weight cause I’m a diabetic!! So I’m in a no-win situation!!!! Thank you Amazon for giving me some cloths to wear. I ordered sizes 2-5 in slacks or jeans, small or 5-6 pj’s, small or med tops, small or 5-6 lounge clothing, so I’d say they are true to size at least for me they are. So hope that helps with ur sizing if u not sure!! Cause all the clothing was in that size range and I have 2  items that is to big out of all the clothing I ordered. Grouped all clothing in this review on size instead of  each individual piece of clothing!!! So go with ur size u are changing to and Amazon measurements to make sure and by looking at my before and after size, weight that should get u right on size u need to order.

reviews.title: Super product. Great price.
reviews.text: Really responsive and not overly sensitive. Has been a great addition for tablet. Seamless connection didn’t loose once. Easy to navigate instructions for set up. Great battery life. Used for 7 hours consecutive without sign of needing charged.

reviews.title: Move along. Don't waste your time and money here.
reviews.text:
UPDATE: Two months! Two months this mouse lasted, and that was with very light use. Fully charged, I was just scrolling with it when I felt the wheel break. It just stopped making the little clicky sound/feeling. No trauma, no misuse, just very very very cheaply made. I surrender. It's time to cough up the money and buy the Apple brand mouse for my MacBook. My sanity is at least worth the $60.

ORIGINAL REVIEW:
After three previous tries, I finally got a Bluetooth mouse for my MacBook. I'm hoping this one is sturdier than the last I purchased that barely lasted six months. That remains to be seen, but given the product materials, I'm not hopeful. Making the connection after power-up or sleep mode is a little finicky. Also, a solid flat dark surface/mouse pad seems to be a prerequisite. Without it, the cursor is slow to respond or just does its own thing. I've never seen a mouse with the jitters before, but this one will cause the cursor to jiggle and twitch, even though the mouse itself it perfectly still, untouched. I've watched the cursor jitter clear off the screen. However, using a solid black mouse pad seems to have dealt with the problem. I would send it back and try a different product, but I've sent so many cheaply made and/or mislabeled mice back to Amazon in the past month, I've got return fatigue. We'll give this one a chance with the mousepad solution.

reviews.title: Won't hold a charge - must keep plugged in
reviews.text:
I've been through two of these. I returned/exchanged this first hoping it was just a defect. This mouse will only function appropriately for about 4-5 minutes tops if not directly plugged in to USB , otherwise it starts jumping/skipping/lagging etc. Plugged in it's perfect though - so if you get lucky and get one that holds a charge you'll probably be very happy with it. I just decided to keep this one and keep it plugged in. It's not ideal but it gets the job done.
I should probably mention that it is very easy to set up, basically plug and play - which was nice.

reviews.title: Definitely returning and buying a different brand
reviews.text: I had high hopes for this laptop... very very very slow. I mean how can a company like HP in this day in age make a laptop this slow. I didn’t expect speeds you would see in a gaming laptop for this price but I at least want to be able to watch a movie or even start the laptop within 10 minutes, and they don’t even allow you to upgrade the RAM or anything from what I can tell... and the battery life is laughable, like a previous comment said, about 1 percent per minute. I would even go as far as to say that it dies faster than that. Purchased this for my sister for her birthday but will definitely return and go with a different laptop.

title: Logitech M585 Multi-Device Wireless Mouse – Control and Move Text/Images/Files Between 2 Windows and Apple Mac Computers and Laptops with Bluetooth or USB, 2 Year Battery Life, Graphite
description: Talk about a game changer! With Logitech FLOW, M585 Multi-Device has the almost magical capacity to navigate seamlessly on two computers and copy-paste from one to the other – even if you're using a PC and a Mac. It certainly beats sending yourself emails. M585 also comes with a host of other features to improve your productivity, your way: fast and easy scrolling through long web pages; five programmable buttons, including two handy thumb buttons; a 2-year battery life** and a curved, domed shape that supports your palm comfortably during long hours of work or play. Dual connectivity (Bluetooth or 2.4 GHz Logitech Unifying). System Requirements: Required: Bluetooth low energy technologyWindows 10 or later Windows 8Mac OS X 10.10 or lateChrome OSAndroid 5.0 or later|Required: Available USB portWindows 10 or later Windows 8 Windows 7Mac OS X 10.05 or laterChrome OS|Internet connection for software download USB port.
features: CROSS-COMPUTER CONTROL - Game-changing capacity to navigate seamlessly on two computers, and copy-paste text, images, and files from one to the other using Logitech FLOW
DUAL CONNECTIVITY - Use with up to three Windows or Mac computers and laptops via included Unifying receiver or Bluetooth Smart wireless technology
LONG BATTERY LIFE- The Logitech M585 just keeps going, with 2 years of power on a single AA battery
ULTRA-PRECISE SCROLLING- Micro-precision wheel packs more grooves per millimeter to make scrolling through long webpages faster and easier
CURVED DESIGN - Domed shape provides right hand support for your palm comfortably during long hours of work or play
Note : In case of Wireless mouse, the USB receiver will be provided inside or along with the mouse

reviews.title: Excellent travel size and 6 month long battery life!
reviews.text:
Updated 1 year later(May 3, 2020)

Down grading from 5 stars to 3 stars because it turns out there might be a bug in the mouse that once you pair it with 2 different computers over bluetooth, you cannot reset the mouse to use the wireless dongle. There is also no support on the Logitech website - try searching their website for the manual for this mouse, it's absolutely missing. You'll see an FAQ section and some various sections on tech spec, but no setup guide or manual!

*********

If you're tried of replacing batteries, this mouse is for you! I'm impressed by how long a single AA battery lasts in this mouse. I haven't had to replace the battery since getting it 6 months ago even with daily use. The two modes is nice since it lets me connect this mouse to two computers! The bluetooth is strong and connects well to my MacBook Pro, while the included radio frequency receiver is plugged into a iMac and I can switch between computers with a. simple button click.

reviews.title: Great travel mouse!
reviews.text: Love the feel of it. Easy to connect. Small enough to use for travel yet big enough to where it doesn’t hurt to use ergonomically.

reviews.title: WOW! Seamless movement from one computer to the other!
reviews.text:
This device synched to both computers quickly. Download the 'Logi Options' software on both, then enable 'Flow'
Move the mouse off the bottom of one screen & it appears at the top of the other laptop.
Copy a file on computer one, switch to the computer two, right-click->paste. You have copied the file took computer one to computer two.
The mouse itself is legit comfortable, precise asks smooth.
Add 'Flow' and it is also revolutionary.
Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Nice mouse for Mac Pro using Big Sur OS
reviews.text: I was looking for a mouse for my MacPro computer.  It's got 2 buttons on the mouse that I wanted to setup as volume up, and volume down.  But there is no instructions on how to do this, and I can't find any.  I'm using the mouse as a standard mouse with scroll for web pages.  Works perfect for that.

reviews.title: Nice and quiet
reviews.text:
Nice, quiet mouse at a great price. It's on the smaller size, just what I needed for carrying in the computer bag. I have long fingers, but not necessarily large hands, and this fits perfectly for me. The scroll wheel is nice and smooth (and also quiet). You can feel some tactile "knurling" when you scroll, so it's not baby's-butt-smooth, but it's not like scrolling over a circular-saw blade either.

Using the USB dongle, the mouse is very responsive. The Bluetooth connection seemed a little laggy to me. No stars off unless it does the same when I test it on another PC.

I do not intend to install the Logitech Options software so I cannot speak to the usefulness of Flow or reassigning buttons.

Pros
- USB and Bluetooth connectivity
- Can use with up to two devices.
- 7 buttons: L, R, Center, Center-Left, Center-Right, Back, Forward. Eight if you include the PC selector button.
- Very quiet left/right click buttons
- Nearly quiet center click and back/forward buttons
- Uses one AA battery (preferred over non-replaceable battery)
- Battery life advertised at 2 years.
- Has an on/off switch on the bottom

Cons
- Possible laggy response using Bluetooth. I need to test on another PC to be sure.

Other consideration:
- The USB dongle storage is behind the battery door. If you frequently remove the dongle from the PC, this might be a concern for you (it's not a problem for me).

reviews.title: Good mouse, good shape to it
reviews.text: I do like this mouse and it's great for the price, but the buttons are tougher to click down than other mouses I've used.

reviews.title: I would buy this again
reviews.text: This mouse is ergonomic and works beautifully. I work all day with my laptop and operating effortlessly with minimal stress is important to me. The curved design reduces wrist pressure. This is wireless, ergonomic design, back/forward buttons, and lightweight. The red silicone roller highlights overall color of the mouse. I like everything about the mouse and the plug and play feature. Strongly recommended.

reviews.title: Works well
reviews.text: Took me a minute to figure out how to turn it on but I got it. It takes one AA battery. It has a button to change the tracking speed, the lowest speed is almost to fast for me but I’ll get used to it. Overall I would recommend

reviews.title: precise since I use it for Photoshop
reviews.text: precise and long lasting

reviews.title: Best mouse
reviews.text: This is by far the best mouse I've ever owned, (and I've tried a lot of different makes and models). I have several, actually, one for my work computer, one each for my home computers and another one for an ASUS tablet/laptop. I also have several in "reserve" in case one fails, which doesn't happen often, if at all. Overall, a great mouse and a great value. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: A great wireless mouse. Love it.

reviews.title: Best mouse out there
reviews.text: I've used these for a few years now and I don't know that there's a better mouse on the market. Battery life is amazing, size if a perfect mix of full functions and laptop packing size. Recommended for any purpose though.

reviews.title: Corel Office
reviews.text: Only purchased because it stated it was "like" Microsoft. But I should have read closer, It stated it was compatible with Microsoft. Still, the software is easy to use and installs without problem. Great starter for maybe the high school student wanting to learn basics. For my deeper needs in business, it is a little light but starting with Corel then transferring to Microsoft files are very easy and NO data is lost as of yet. I do say it is a good value

title: KLO Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook/MacBook air/Pro/iPad, Wireless Mouse for Laptop/Notebook/pc/iPad/Chromebook (BT/A deep Pink-Black)
description: Adopt bluetooth 3.0/5.2 technology, built-in 500mAH A product lithium battery, configuration charging line, like a mobile phone, easy to charge, more scientific, charge and discharge of more than 500 times, the mouse no longer need to buy a battery. size: 113mm x 58mm x23mm weight : 3.2 oz package: Bluetooth mouse x1, USB Charging Cable x1 How to use Bluetooth wireless mouse:Apple Mac MacBook/pro/Air 2012/2013/2014/2015/2016/2017/2018/2019: first, open the mouse switch, open the computer system preferences, open the bluetooth, when the computer Bluetooth display is searching for nearby Bluetooth devices, hold down the mouse button (at the bottom of the mouse small black button) and keep 3 to 8 seconds, and then your computer display the search bluetooth mouse, bluetooth device click on the link, and then the connection is successful Win7/8/10/XP series notebook computer usage instructions: First, open the mouse switch, open the computer settings, open the device Bluetooth function, open add Bluetooth, open Bluetooth, when the computer Bluetooth display is searching for nearby Bluetooth devices, hold down the mouse button (at the bottom of the mouse small black button) and keep 3 to 8 seconds, and then your computer display the search bluetooth mouse, bluetooth device click on the link, and then the connection is successful
features: ✪✪3DPI SWITCH:Using high-performance optical chips, up to 1600 dpi(800, 1200, 1600) accurately tracking,to meet different needs.

✪✪Adopt bluetooth 3.0/5.2 technology,built-in durable 500mAh Lithium polymer rechargeable battery,high cycle life, The charging time is about 1.5-2.5 hours, lasting use time, the Auto Switch Off function will help you save energy as your bluetooth mouse will switch off when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If you do not use the mouse for eight minutes, it will go to sleeping mode, you can press the any button to weak it up. energy saving and extremely low power consumption.
✪✪It is compatible with Mac OS Windows /Win8/10/and is suitable for desktop/ipad/notebook/Mac Macbook Pro/Air(2017/2018/2019/2020/2021) iMac and other devices.

✪✪contoured shape, Ultra Thin and lightweight design, smooth surface ensure maximum comfort and support for your hand even after long working hours, The rubber scroll wheel makes sure that your hand will not slip when scrolling,This bluetooth mouse can meet your demand of daily office working and personal preference.

✪✪To provide you with quality after-sales service: any quality problems within a month can be directly returned or replaced.It is recommended to use the USB port of the computer to charge the mouse, or use a 5V 1A charger, no larger than 5V 1A.

reviews.title: Short life span
reviews.text: Worked for about 4 months and then just stopped. I charged it, it says it’s connected to my MacBook, but nothing happens.

reviews.title: Nice Mouse but Didn't last long
reviews.text:
Beautiful color and smooth clicking/tracking. A bit frustrating having to turn it off and on to take out of sleep mode but does work well.

Sad to say that the mouse stopped working since I wrote my review. I don't know if it won't take the charge or what.

reviews.title: It’s junk…
reviews.text: I bought this mouse in late July. It now early September and it won’t even hold a charge. I missed the return window, now it’s expensive garbage… buyer beware.

reviews.title: so cute
reviews.text: my granddaughter loved it

reviews.title: Great Battery Life, Comfortable hold for a slim-line mouse, Llama is AWESOME!
reviews.text: I'm not crazy about the aerodynamic mice, but I bought one because of the Llama.  It is VERY slim, but more comfortable than I imagined it would be to hold.  The Llama image is on the mouse solidly, it won't come off, which is ideal.  The mouse was easy to install, took my computer maximum of 1 minute to install the driver and my computer is 7 years old.  The other great thing is it has a 'battery saving' feature that puts the mouse into sleep mode when not in use.  To use it again simply left-click once and your mouse is awake and functioning again.  I use this mouse all day for work and at night for pleasure, haven't replaced the batteries yet!
